messages: Infra handoff is complete. Here's a summary of what was done:  **Created `/apps/sample-app/in-progress/infra-interfaces.md`** containing:  | Section | Contents | |---|---| | **Endpoints** | Function App, APIM Gateway, Static Web App, Cosmos DB URLs | | **Resource Names** | Resource group, Function App, APIM, SWA, Cosmos DB account, Key Vault | | **Auth Config** | Entra Tenant/Client IDs, CI/CD client IDs, CORS origins | | **Cosmos DB (Kanban)** | Account, endpoint, database (`sample-app-db`), new container (`Tasks`), partition key (`/workspaceId`), auth method | | **Terraform Outputs** | All 14 outputs with `application_insights_connection_string` masked as `<HIDDEN>` (sensitive) | | **Env Vars for Downstream** | Backend, Frontend, E2E, and Integration test environment variables |  **Security:** The `application_insights_connection_string` (marked `sensitive: true` by Terraform) was replaced with `<HIDDEN>`. All other outputs are non-sensitive resource names/URLs.

No CI/CD changes needed for frontend.  Now I have all the context needed. Let me implement the Kanban board page, NavBar update, and E2E tests.
Now update the NavBar to add the "Task Board" link:
Now create the E2E test file:
Now let me run Jest to verify:
All tests pass. Now run the Next.js build:
Build succeeded. Now run lint:
All passing. Now verify E2E tests compile:
All 11 tests listed, including the 3 new task board tests. Now verify lockfile:
Lockfile is in sync. Now let me run the review and commit:
No breaking changes, moderate risk (50/100) which is expected for a new feature addition. Health score unchanged. Now let me commit and complete:
Now leave a doc-note and mark complete:

All done. Here's a summary of what was implemented:  ## Frontend Implementation Summary  ### Files Created 1. **`frontend/src/app/tasks/page.tsx`** — Kanban task board page with:    - 3-column layout: **To Do**, **In Progress**, **Done**    - **HTML5 native drag-and-drop** (`draggable`, `dragstart`, `dragover`, `dragleave`, `drop`, `dragend`) — zero external dependencies    - **Drop zone visual feedback**: `bg-primary/10 border-dashed border-primary` on drag-over    - **Same-column drop no-op**: checks `dragSourceStatus` against target and skips API call    - **Fallback buttons**: Start (TODO→IN_PROGRESS), Done (IN_PROGRESS→DONE), Back to To Do (IN_PROGRESS→TODO), Reopen (DONE→TODO)    - **Optimistic UI**: local state updated immediately, reverted on API error    - **New task form** at top of To Do column with `Input` + `Button` from `@/components/ui/primitives`    - Accessibility: `role="list"` on columns, `role="listitem"` on cards, `aria-label` on columns    - All API calls via `apiFetch` with Zod validation using shared `@branded/schemas`  2. **`e2e/tasks.spec.ts`** — 3 Playwright E2E tests:    - Create task → drag to In Progress → reload → verify persistence    - Button fallback: Start → Done → Reopen through all statuses    - Same-column drop no-op: route intercept asserts no PATCH call  ### Files Modified - **`frontend/src/components/NavBar.tsx`** — Added "Task Board" `<Link href="/tasks">` after "About" using existing `navLinkClass` helper  ### Verification - ✅ Jest: 14/14 tests passed - ✅ Next.js build: compiled successfully, `/tasks` route generated as static page - ✅ ESLint: zero errors - ✅ E2E tests: all 11 tests (8 existing + 3 new) compile and list correctly - ✅ Lockfile: `npm ci` succeeded - ✅ No CI/CD workflow changes needed (env vars already configured)

messages: Now let me explore existing patterns I need to follow:
Let me read the existing patterns and files I need:

Intent: The `@azure/cosmos` and `@azure/identity` packages aren't present despite the spec claiming they were pre-installed from the webhook-dispatcher PR. I need to add them to make the backend work.
All 24 unit tests pass. Now let me run the full test suite and type checking:
All tests pass (44 passing, 19 skipped which are the integration tests). Now type checking:
TypeScript passes clean. Now let me build and verify the esbuild output loads:
All 3 entry points load successfully. Now let me also modify the deploy-backend.yml to add the MAX_TASKS_PER_WORKSPACE setting — the spec requires this:
Now let me run the full quality gate — all tests, type checking, and lint:
All quality gates pass. Let me verify the validate-app.sh is still valid bash:
Now let me do the roam review for post-change verification:
No breaking changes detected. Let me commit my changes. Per commit scope rules, I need separate commits for backend and cicd:
Now commit the CI/CD change separately:
Now leave a doc-note and complete the pipeline:

Backend development is complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:  ## Summary  ### Files Created 1. **`backend/src/functions/fn-tasks.ts`** — 3 Azure Functions v4 HTTP triggers:    - `GET /api/tasks` — Lists all tasks for workspace "default" from Cosmos DB    - `POST /api/tasks` — Creates a new task with Zod validation, UUID generation, and `MAX_TASKS_PER_WORKSPACE` enforcement (429 on limit exceeded)    - `PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status` — Updates task status with Zod validation, 404 handling for missing tasks  2. **`backend/src/functions/__tests__/fn-tasks.test.ts`** — 24 unit tests covering:    - Happy paths for all 3 endpoints    - Input validation (missing/empty/too-long title, invalid status, invalid JSON)    - 429 rate limiting enforcement    - 404 handling (missing task, Cosmos 404 error)    - 500 error handling for Cosmos failures    - `updatedAt` timestamp mutation verification  3. **`backend/src/functions/__tests__/tasks.integration.test.ts`** — Integration tests covering:    - CRUD flow: POST → GET → PATCH status transitions    - Validation errors (400 for bad input, 401 without auth)    - `MAX_TASKS_PER_WORKSPACE` control plane validation via `az CLI`  ### Files Modified 4. **`backend/package.json`** — Added `@azure/cosmos` and `@azure/identity` dependencies (prerequisite deps not present from webhook-dispatcher PR) 5. **`.apm/hooks/validate-app.sh`** — Appended curl check for `GET /api/tasks` endpoint reachability 6. **`.github/workflows/deploy-backend.yml`** — Added `az functionapp config appsettings set` step for `MAX_TASKS_PER_WORKSPACE=500`  ### Quality Gates Passed - ✅ 44 unit tests passing (24 new + 20 existing) - ✅ TypeScript compilation clean (`tsc --noEmit`) - ✅ Lint clean - ✅ esbuild bundles all 3 function entry points - ✅ All entry points load successfully via `node -e "require(...)"` - ✅ Roam review: no breaking changes, health score unchanged

items.label: Unit Tests Passed — Backend
messages: Good, the backend dev has already created `fn-tasks.ts` and the schema `tasks.ts`. Let me read the key source files and existing tests.
Tests already exist. Let me check if there's an existing unit test file for tasks, and also look at the existing test patterns.
The backend dev has already created comprehensive unit tests. Let me now run them along with schema validation.
All 44 tests passed (3 suites passed, 2 skipped which are integration tests). Now let me run schema validation.

All tests pass: - **Backend unit tests:** 3 suites passed, 44 tests passed (2 integration suites correctly skipped) - **Schema validation:** 1 suite passed, 66 tests passed  Now let me mark the pipeline as complete and commit.

All tasks completed successfully. Here's the summary:  ## Backend Unit Test Results ✅  ### Unit Tests (Jest) - **3 test suites passed**, 2 integration suites correctly skipped - **44 tests passed** across:   - `fn-tasks.test.ts` — 24 tests covering all three handlers:     - `GET /api/tasks` — empty array, tasks array, Cosmos error     - `POST /api/tasks` — valid creation, missing/empty/long title, invalid JSON, 429 limit enforcement, default limit, boundary (200 chars), Cosmos error     - `PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status` — valid transitions (all 3 statuses), invalid status, missing status, invalid JSON, 404 (not found + Cosmos 404), 500 error, updatedAt timestamp change, schema validation   - `fn-hello.test.ts` — 7 tests   - `fn-demo-login.test.ts` — 13 tests  ### Schema Validation - **1 test suite passed**, **66 tests passed** covering:   - `TaskStatusSchema` — valid statuses, invalid/empty/lowercase rejection   - `TaskSchema` — valid task, all statuses, UUID validation, bounds, datetime validation   - `CreateTaskSchema` — valid/empty/missing title, max length, extra field stripping   - `UpdateTaskStatusSchema` — all valid statuses, invalid/missing/empty rejection  ### Pipeline - ✅ `pipeline:complete` — `backend-unit-test` marked as done - ✅ Committed pipeline state update
